checks.command: every methodology/*.md has frontmatter with 6 required keys
methodology/ contains exactly the 7 contracted files, no stray extras

adversarial_check.description: Three-part check beyond the 7 listed commands, using python3+yaml+jsonschema+re: (a) parsed and validated all 7 methodology/*.md frontmatter blocks against schema/frontmatter.schema.json -- all 7 valid (id kebab-case, version semver, status enum, authoritative_source non-empty). (b) Cross-checked methodology/01_execution.md's JSON Verdict Parse Rule text against standard/AGF.md for string consistency: both documents contain all four gate fragments verbatim ('final_verdict.approved === true', 'final_verdict.issues.length === 0', 'final_verdict.missing_acceptance_coverage.length === 0', 'final_verdict.unsupported_claims.length === 0') -- no drift between the two documents' stated gate rule. (c) Confirmed 03_circuit_breaker.md's attempt-strategy table explicitly labels attempt '4+' as 'FORBIDDEN' in proximity (regex-matched within 80 chars in both directions), not merely co-occurring words elsewhere in the document.
